{{CargoRelic
|name=Laurel Crown
|class_id=20640
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=A crown woven from laurel leaves is a favorite fashion item among the Greeks. The famous god Apollo once made a laurel wreath himself to commemorate his lost love. Later generations often associate symbols such as eternity, immortality, honor, and achievement with the laurel crown.
|fame=14
|art=33
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 90/90
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 90/90
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 90/90
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 90/90
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 90/90<br> (Awakened)
}}
